title: Add verification fields to task schema
description: Added acceptance_criteria, verified_by, and review_outcome fields to the Task schema. Tasks now support mini-DOD (acceptance_criteria), reviewer attribution (verified_by), and review results (review_outcome). Also fixed agent: [] on completed tasks — agent must always be populated. Backfilled 598 tasks across both repos.

in: All project.json task arrays in both repos
out: Frontend/dashboard changes (tasks not rendered individually yet)
Server watcher changes (watchers don't parse task-level fields)

dod.criterion: SPEC.md task schema includes acceptance_criteria, verified_by, review_outcome
All existing project.json tasks have the new fields
SKILL.md Register Projects instructs pipeline to populate task verification fields

tasks.title: Update SPEC.md task schema with verification fields
tasks.output: Added 3 new fields to Section 2.3, updated constraints to mandate agent+verified_by+review_outcome on completed tasks.

dod.criterion: acceptance_criteria, verified_by, review_outcome added to schema
Constraints section documents when fields must be populated

tasks.title: Backfill existing project.json tasks with new fields
tasks.output: 62 files updated, 598 tasks backfilled across both repos. Completed tasks in completed projects get review_outcome: pass and verified_by inferred from project-level reviewers.

dod.criterion: All tasks in agent-conductor have the 3 new fields
All tasks in sw have the 3 new fields
Completed tasks infer verified_by from project reviewers

tasks.title: Fix empty agent arrays on completed tasks
tasks.output: 455 tasks fixed (10 in agent-conductor, 445 in sw). All completed tasks now have agent attribution.

dod.criterion: Empty agents replaced with ["self"] for CEO-session work

tasks.title: Update SKILL.md to populate task-level verification
tasks.output: Updated Register Projects section to require all 4 fields on tasks, with instructions on where to source each field from.

dod.criterion: Register Projects step lists agent, acceptance_criteria, verified_by, review_outcome as mandatory task fields
